sources.title: Databricks AI Dev Kit
sources.description: Databricks Toolkit for AI Coding Agents — MCP server, skills, and core library for building on Databricks with Claude Code, Cursor, etc.
sources.notes: Official Databricks solution — Gold certified project. 50+ MCP tools, 19 skills.

sources.title: Claude Code Skills — Official Documentation
sources.description: Complete guide to creating, managing, and sharing skills to extend Claude Code capabilities.
sources.notes: Official Anthropic documentation. Covers bundled skills, custom skills, subagents, frontmatter config.

sources.title: 7 Insane OpenClaw Use Cases (AntiGravity)
sources.description: Video by Jack Roberts showcasing creative applications of OpenClaw technology.
sources.notes: Explores creative/unconventional use cases for OpenClaw platform.

sources.title: MCP Official Specification
sources.description: The authoritative Model Context Protocol specification — architecture, primitives (tools, resources, prompts), transports, security, and capability negotiation.
sources.notes: Protocol version 2025-11-25. Stable release 2026.1.0. Created by Anthropic, adopted by OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft.

sources.title: Build an MCP Server — Official Tutorial
sources.description: Step-by-step tutorial to build MCP servers in Python (FastMCP) and TypeScript, then connect to Claude Desktop.
sources.notes: Official Anthropic tutorial. Builds a weather server with get_alerts and get_forecast tools.

sources.title: MCP Official Reference Servers
sources.description: Official collection of Model Context Protocol servers — reference implementations for filesystem, git, memory, fetch, and more.
sources.notes: 79,900+ stars. Includes Everything, Fetch, Filesystem, Git, Memory, Sequential Thinking, Time servers.

sources.title: MCP TypeScript SDK
sources.description: Official TypeScript SDK for building MCP servers and clients. McpServer class, Zod validation, stdio + HTTP transports.
sources.notes: Package: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Includes server, client, middleware (Express, Hono), and OAuth helpers.

sources.title: MCP Python SDK (FastMCP)
sources.description: Official Python SDK with FastMCP — type hints + docstrings auto-generate tool definitions. Most popular MCP SDK.
sources.notes: 21,900+ stars. FastMCP: decorator-based tool/resource/prompt definitions. Package: mcp[cli].

sources.title: GitHub Official MCP Server
sources.description: GitHub's official MCP Server for AI-powered GitHub operations — repos, issues, PRs, code search, actions.
sources.notes: 27,400+ stars. Official GitHub project. Runs via Docker. Requires GitHub PAT.
